title: Lophiolepis gagnidzei
taxonomy: Lophiolepis gagnidzei belongs to the family Lycopodiaceae and is classified as a species of club moss. It is a type of vascular plant that is native to Georgia. The classification of Lophiolepis gagnidzei is further broken down into the genus Lophiolepis, which is a monotypic genus containing only this species. This plant is a rare and endangered species, found in limited regions. Lophiolepis gagnidzei is a member of the larger division Lycopodiophyta, which includes all species of club mosses.
